text:
Ancient Kappe (, Kodai Kappē) is an ancient language. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Curly, a member of Beyond Netero's Dark Continent Expedition Team, challenges Ging to another ancient language contest. He chooses the Ancient Kappe language as the subject, starting with 'N'. The two square off; however, Curly becomes easily burnt out. This is because of Ging's superior knowledge of his linguistic knowledge on Kappe, and he concedes defeat.
